title: Largest Multiple of Three
hints: Recall that a number is divisible by 3 if the sum of its digits is divisible by 3. Focus on the sum.
Sort the digits in descending order to maximize the value. Then check if the total sum is divisible by 3.
If the sum has a remainder of 1 or 2 when divided by 3, remove the smallest number of digits with the same remainder to fix it.
